Task.Title: So Nhap Giang Ho 1/5
Task.AcceptTalk: Chao mung bang huu den voi the gioi Vo Kiem.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Long Ngu.
Task.CompleteTalk: Giang ho day song, binh bien khap noi, rat can bang huu ra mat giai quyet!

Task.Title: So Nhap Giang Ho 2/5
Task.AcceptTalk: Bang huu hay noi chuyen voi cac vi bo lao trong thon se hieu ro tinh hinh hon.
Task.DoingTalk: Tham hoi ong chu tieu diem
Task.CompleteTalk: Gan day chien loan khap noi, mot thon lang nhu o day cung khong the tranh khoi nao loan.

Task.Title: So Nhap Giang Ho 3/5
Task.AcceptTalk: Bang huu nen noi chuyen voi lao Xa Phu, ong ay thuong xuyen len thanh thi se hieu ro hon.
Task.DoingTalk: Tham hoi Xa Phu
Task.CompleteTalk: Moi ngay ta deu phai dua khach len thanh thi, tren duong di thuong xuyen thay canh nao loan, that nguy hiem.

Task.Title: So Nhap Giang Ho 4/5
Task.AcceptTalk: Long Ngu la nguoi co trach nhiem, ong ay huong dan nguoi moi lam quen voi thoi buoi binh bien nay.
Task.DoingTalk: Quay lai gap Long Ngu
Task.CompleteTalk: Thieu anh hung mat mui thanh tu, than thu phi pham. At la tu Tuong Duong toi day roi ?

Task.Title: So Nhap Giang Ho 5/5
Task.AcceptTalk: Trong the gioi Vo Kiem, vo hoc vi ton, bang huu nen tim hieu mot chut o cho Vo Su.
Task.DoingTalk: Tim Vo Su hoc vo o Ba Lang Huyen
Task.CompleteTalk: Hom nay that nhieu nguoi tim ta, vo hoc bat dai tinh tham, nhung truoc tien ta can kiem tra nen tang cua bang huu.

Task.Title: Vo Hoc Co Ban 1/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Bang huu hay di danh coc go de ta xem the luc cua bang huu
Task.DoingTalk: Tap danh coc go o Ba Lang Huyen
Task.CompleteTalk: Coc go la bai kiem tra the luc tot nhat

Task.Title: Vo Hoc Co Ban 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Tiep tuc danh moc nhan cho ta xem ky thuat cua bang huu
Task.DoingTalk: Tap danh moc nhan o Ba Lang Huyen
Task.CompleteTalk: Moc nhan la bai kiem tra ve phan ung va toc do cua bang huu.

Task.Title: Vo Hoc Co Ban 3/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Cuoi cung la bao cat. kiem tra noi luc cua bang huu.
Task.DoingTalk: Tap danh bao cat o Ba Lang Huyen
Task.CompleteTalk: Nen tang cua bang huu rat tot, bai kiem tra xong roi, bang huu hay ve di.

Task.Title: Long Ngu Gia Gia
Task.AcceptTalk: Nguoi den day tim than bi thuong nhan? Ta co the giup nguoi ! Nhung truoc tien hay giup ta lam mot chut viec. Mua giup ta 5 binh Kim Sang Duoc (tieu
Task.DoingTalk: Di tim Long Ngu noi chuyen
Task.CompleteTalk: Moi viec rat don gian, bang huu da chuan bi xong chua, chung ta se bat dau ngay thoi!

Task.Title: Tim Duoc Lieu
Task.AcceptTalk: bang huu bi thuong roi, hay kiem chut Thit Heo dua cho Ngo Than Y che thuoc, gui loi cam on tu Long Ngu nua nhe
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet heo trang o Ba Lang Huyen
Task.CompleteTalk: Kiem mot it Thit Tuoi lam thuc an de giup co the co them nang luong

Task.Title: Dan duoc than ky 1/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Huyet Dan la mot loai thuoc quy, phai dung Thit Heo va nhieu thuoc quy khac luyen bay bay bon chin ngay moi duoc.
Task.DoingTalk: Thu thap Huyet Thao o Ba Lang Huyen
Task.CompleteTalk: Ngoai dieu che Huyet Dan, Huyet thao con co the dieu che kim san duoc.

Task.Title: Dan duoc than ky 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Bang huu hay giup ta mua 5 binh Kim San Duoc o cho Ngo Than Y, ong ta se huong dan bang huu su dung.
Task.DoingTalk: Mua Kim San Duoc
Task.CompleteTalk: Kim San Duoc la thuoc dac hieu chuyen phuc hoi sinh menh, bang huu nen chuan bi that nhieu truoc khi hanh tau!

Task.Title: Dan duoc than ky 3/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Thuoc hoi phuc co nhieu loai, nhung co ban nhat la hoi phuc sinh luc va noi luc, bang huu hay dung thu xem sao.
Task.DoingTalk: Su dung binh Kim Sang Duoc
Task.CompleteTalk: Trong qua trinh hanh tau bang huu se thu thap duoc tai san, hay den Hieu Thuoc de mua thuoc du phong trong nguoi.

Task.Title: Gui thuoc cho Thuong Nhan 1/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Than Bi Thuong Nhan dang bi thuong, ong ay la ban lau nam cua ta. Hay giup ta mang mot so duoc lieu nay cho han.
Task.DoingTalk: Gui duoc lieu den thuong nhan o Tuong Duong
Task.CompleteTalk: Khu khu! Cac ha that chu dao, lai vi ta ma vat va kiem loai thuoc quy nay.Ta rat cam kich !

Task.Title: Gui thuoc cho Thuong Nhan 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Vo lam gan day co nhieu dieu ki la, quan hung ac ba ngay cang nhieu hon
Task.DoingTalk: Hoi chuyen Long Ngu o Ba Lang Huyen
Task.CompleteTalk: Cac ha tim ta hoi ve tinh hinh gan day? Binh bien khap noi, khoi lua ngap troi.

Task.Title: Phien phuc o Tan Thu Thon
Task.AcceptTalk: Vo lam gan day co nhieu dieu ki la, quan hung ac ba ngay cang nhieu hon
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi long ngu o Ba Lang Huyen
Task.CompleteTalk: Khu khu! Cac ha tim ta hoi chuyen la dung roi do, tai Tan Thu Thon nay co hai the luc luon tranh dau voi nhau la tong quan va kim quan do

Task.Title: Uy hiep cua dich nhan
Task.AcceptTalk: Dan thu rung nay that rac roi, pha hoai mua mang cua nong dan, giup ton dan tieu diet chung...!
Task.DoingTalk: Diet tru Huou Dom o Ba Lang Huyen
Task.CompleteTalk: Hao cong phu! bang huu con tre da co than thu nhu vay,tuong lai se thanh cao thu.

Task.Title: Bai kien de tu thieu lam
Task.AcceptTalk: Cap do cua nguoi da du de gia nhap mon ho, hay tim hieu va chon mot mon phai nguoi muon gia nhap, Thieu Lam la bac dau tong giang ho voi bay muoi hai tuyet ky vang danh nguoi nen bat dau tu ho
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Tich Huyen
Task.CompleteTalk: Duoc khai sang boi Dat Ma Su To den tu Tay Truc, Thieu Lam phai toa lac tai nui Tung Son Tinh Ha Nam va tu xua da duoc menh danh la Thien Ha De Nhat mon phai tai Trung Nguyen. Ngoi chua nay cung duoc xem la dai dien cho "Vo Lam Chanh phai".

Task.Title: Bai kien de tu thien vuong
Task.AcceptTalk: Doi voi tang nhan thieu lam, cong phu chinh la tu hanh, la tham thien. Muc dich chinh la thay doi pham chat con nguoi.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Bui Vien
Task.CompleteTalk: Thien Vuong Bang chung da so song bang nghe canh nong, khong chen vao chuyen giang ho, tham chi rat it tiep xuc voi the gioi ben ngoai. Vua khang Tong, vua chong Kim, khong lam dieu ac, ta chanh phan minh.

Task.Title: Bai kien de tu duong mon
Task.AcceptTalk: Tong Da cua bang nay la Thien Vuong dao, mot “doc dao” toa lac chinh giua khu vuc Dong Dinh ho, ban doanh vo cung hiem tro, neu nhu khong co nguoi trong bang huong dan, nguoi ngoai vo phuong tim duoc den Tong da
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Duong Te Dan
Task.CompleteTalk: Duoc khai sang boi gia toc ho Duong va hung cu mot vung Tu Xuyen - Ba Thuc rong lon, mon phai nay lung danh giang ho da hon tram nam nho vao so truong su dung am khi va co quan cua minh.

Task.Title: Bai kien de tu ngu doc
Task.AcceptTalk: Trai qua nhieu doi, Duong mon de tu chuyen nghien cuu, phat minh cac loai am khi va hoa khi nen chung ngay cang tinh vi va co uy luc kinh nguoi khien giang ho ai nay deu ngan so.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Bien Nhat Xuan
Task.CompleteTalk: Noi Ngu Doc Giao hung cu la nui Ngu Doc noi mien Tay Vuc xa xoi it nguoi biet toi. Day la mot giao phai than bi, nguoi trong Giang ho goi la sac bien. Nguyen tac cua Ngu Doc Giao la “Loi ich quyet dinh ban thu”, co loi moi lam, can ban la khong quan bat ke chuyen thi phi chinh ta nao.

Task.Title: Bai kien de tu nga mi
Task.AcceptTalk: Giua cac Dong mon Ngu Doc Giao co the noi khong co tinh nghia gi ca, giua cac giao do cung co the dung doc ha doc, nguoi bi trung doc chet la do toi hoc nghe chua tinh!
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Huyen Tinh
Task.CompleteTalk: Tong Da cua phai nay toa lac tren nui Nga My, tinh Tu Xuyen, lai nam tren thanh dia Phat giao nen lay ten do ma dat thanh ten mon phai cua minh.

Task.Title: Bai kien de tu thuy yen
Task.AcceptTalk: De tu phai nay gom toan nu gioi, phan dong la nguoi xuat gia. Trai qua nhieu doi, cung da co nhieu Nu Chuong Mon tiep noi nhau dan dat bang chung, song noi danh nhat la Diet Tuyet Su Thai va Chu Chuong Mon.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi To Nha
Task.CompleteTalk: Day la mot mon phai than bi nam doc theo Nhi Hai, vung nui Diem son (thuoc nuoc Dai Ly) va giap bien cuong Van Nam xa xoi.

Task.Title: Bai kien de tu cai bang
Task.AcceptTalk: Tuong truyen Su To cua mon phai nay von la mot nu hiep bi tinh nhan phu ray, muon roi xa chon do hoi, bo di an cu de quen het su doi nen da den vung nui bien thuy Van Nam xa xoi heo lanh.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi La Tuan
Task.CompleteTalk: Lich su Cai Bang co the noi la tu rat lau doi, danh xung “Thien Ha De Nhat Bang” khong phai tu nhien ma co. Nho tinh than quat cuong va nhan so dong dao, phai nay luon chiem mot vi tri dang ke trong vo lam Trung Nguyen.

Task.Title: Bai kien de tu thien nhan
Task.AcceptTalk: Trong bon be Dong Tay Nam Bac, noi nao co an xin, noi do co Cai Bang. Nhung de tu trong bang thuong yeu giup do nhau, chia se moi thu, tao nen mot khoi thong nhat luon theo pho Chinh nghia.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Ta Phi Kinh
Task.CompleteTalk: Nam o Trung Do (tuc khu vuc Bac Kinh hien nay), lay khu vuc son coc Vu Linh Son lam dai ban doanh, Thien Nhan giao la mot to chuc duoc Kim quoc bao tro nham muc dich doi pho voi vo lam Trung Nguyen Thien Nhan giao von khong co lap truong Chanh - Ta.

Task.Title: Bai kien de tu vo dang
Task.AcceptTalk: Net khac biet lon nhat cua Thien Nhan giao voi cac giao phai khac la: Thien Nhan giao giong nhu mot to chuc chinh tri. Trong bang co rat nhieu nhan vat tai ba xuat chung ho nhap mon khong nham muc dich hoc nghe ma vi dia vi chinh tri.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Minh Tue
Task.CompleteTalk: Vo Dang son con goi la Thai Hoa son duoc menh danh la : "Trung Quoc dao giao danh son” nam o phia Tay Bac tinh Ho Bac. Phia Bac giap Tan Linh Phia Nam giap Ba Son, nui non trap trung doc ngang hon 400 dam

Task.Title: Bai kien de tu con lon
Task.AcceptTalk: Day cung la Tong Da cua phai Vo Dang. To su sang lap ra Vo Dang phai la “Lap Thap Dao nhan” Truong Tam Phong. Truong Tam Phong co ten la Truong Toan Nhat, con goi la Truong Quan Bao, “Tam Phong” la dao hieu.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Quy Kinh Tinh
Task.CompleteTalk: Nho hong phuoc cua tien nhan, cac vi chuong mon ke tiep deu co tai luoc, khong ngung lam lon manh Con Lon phai, khien no dan tro thanh mon phai lon trong Giang ho, hung cu Tay vuc, cung tranh quyen voi cac dai mon phai.

Task.Title: Bai kien de tu hoa son
Task.AcceptTalk: De tu phai nay co ca nam lan nu, chuyen dung dao chu. Tuy tin vao dao Giao nhung lai duoc phep hon phoi.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Tat Minh
Task.CompleteTalk: Lich su phai Hoa Son da rat lau doi, tuong truyen bat dau tu Duong Ba Kieu thoi Xuan Thu da co nguoi len dinh Hoa Son dung leu kho hoc. Con chau Duong Thi doi nao cung co nguoi xuat sac, truyen den Duong Kien trieu Tuy da la van dinh thien ha. Ve sau tuy suy yeu nhung khong the xem nhe.

Task.Title: Gia Nhap Mon Phai
Task.AcceptTalk: Nguoi trong thien ha an cu Hoa Son, khien cho vo cong co dip tu hoi, ho tu luyen voi y chi manh liet, cang khien cho vo hoc Hoa Son them phan ky dieu. De tu Hoa Son noi danh thien ha voi hinh tuong mot bo ao xanh, mot thanh truong kiem, mot anh mat lanh lung bang quan voi the tuc. Dai Hiep hay chon mot mon phai de gia nhap va quay lai gap long ngu nhan thuong.
Task.DoingTalk: Gia nhap mot mon phai
Task.CompleteTalk: Chuc mung bang huu da hoc duoc vo cong thuong thua, tien do rong mo dang cho bang huu..........!

Task.Title: Qua mung cua Long Ngu
Task.AcceptTalk: Khoi dau rat tot, hay nang cap chieu thuc va su dung de tieu diet Kim Mieu giup thon dan.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet Kim Mieu pha hoai cay trong, o Ba Lang Huyen
Task.CompleteTalk: Kha lam, hay cam lay chut tien nay, binh khi nay ta cung dang su dung. Bang huu hay mua mot binh khi tot tai tho ren Bao Thu, den tan thu thon khong the tay khong duoc dau.

Task.Title: Tim Vo Su
Task.AcceptTalk: Gio bang huu da co vo hoc ho than, ta khong phai lo lang nua, hay tim vo su ong ta co viec can bang huu giuo.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Vo Su
Task.CompleteTalk: Dan kim mieu van con tan du o trong o cua chung, that la nguy hiem tiem tang.

Task.Title: Hang O Kim Mieu
Task.AcceptTalk: Bang huu hay truy tim hang o va tieu diet het bon chung.
Task.DoingTalk: Tim hang o Kim Mieu
Task.CompleteTalk: Haha,bang huu that vat va, moi lo tiem tang nay da duoc giai quyet.

Task.Title: Gap Long Ngu
Task.AcceptTalk: Viec cua ta da xong, bang huu hay quay ve di, sau nay co viec ta se tim bang huu!
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Long Ngu.
Task.CompleteTalk: Kim Mieu luon la noi lo cua thon dan, nay da khong con ban tam nua roi!

Task.Title: Giup Than Bi Thuong Nhan
Task.AcceptTalk: Than Bi Thuong Nhan tren duong buon thuoc quy hiem gap su co, hay den giup ong ta.
Task.DoingTalk: Than Bi Thuong Nhan dang can giup do, den Tuong Duong giup ong ta.
Task.CompleteTalk: Thieu hiep den tu Ba Lang Huyen? Long Ngu that co long!

Task.Title: Tim kiem Thao Duoc
Task.AcceptTalk: Trong luc van chuyen ta danh roi mot it thuoc ,giup ta tim lai chung nhe !
Task.DoingTalk: Giup ong ay tim lai mot it do da mat
Task.CompleteTalk: Thieu hiep qua la van vo toan tai do nha, tai hai thuoc cung rat tuyet !

Task.Title: Tieu Diet Nhim
Task.AcceptTalk: Ta phai mang do ve roi, bang huu di duong can than nhe. Gan day co nhieu ten gia nguoi gia quy hai nguoi lam day.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet Nhim o thien vuong phai
Task.CompleteTalk: That loi hai! Bang huu tu xa den day phai khong?

Task.Title: Tim Gai Nhim
Task.AcceptTalk: Su thuc ta bi dau tai, can it Gai Nhim de chua tri, hay thu thap giup ta.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet nhim lay gai
Task.CompleteTalk: That may man khi co bang huu giup ta thu thap nhung vi thuoc nay.

Task.Title: Qua Cua Lo Van Vien 1/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Ta da chuan bi chut vat pham hay giup ta tang no cho Duong Ho.
Task.DoingTalk: Dua qua cho Duong Ho
Task.CompleteTalk: Cam ta dai hiep, tai ha khong con gi de lo lang nua.

Task.Title: Qua Cua Lo Van Vien 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Da khong con viec gi nua, dai hiep khong lam phien ngai them nua!
Task.DoingTalk: Tro ve gap co gioi tien sinh
Task.CompleteTalk: Chao dai hiep, cau da den!

Task.Title: Cuong Hoa 1/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Dai Hiep, trang bi cua cau khong duoc tot. Den gap da luyen dai su ong ta co the giup duoc cau!
Task.DoingTalk: Cuong Hoa Trang Bi
Task.CompleteTalk: Dai Hiep ,cau can ta giup chuyen gi?

Task.Title: Cuong Hoa 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Cuong Hoa trang bi vua co the tang thuoc tinh con co the nhan duoc phan thuong moc Cuong Hoa hien thi ben duoi cung cua trang bi. Bang huu hay thu Cuong Hoa mot lan...
Task.DoingTalk: Cuong Hoa Trang Bi
Task.CompleteTalk: Tot lam, suc manh thuoc tinh trang bi da dc nang cap, bang huu hay thu thap them huyen tinh de co the Cuong Hoa cap cao hon.

Task.Title: Khao Nghiem Cua Da Luyen Dai Su
Task.AcceptTalk: Bang huu muon mua binh sinh luc va noi luc thi phai den dau?
Task.DoingTalk: Trac nghiem cua da luyen dai su
Task.QuestionTable: Bang huu muon mua binh sinh luc va noi luc thi phai den dau?|#Truong Tram Kinh Tap Hoa Tho Ren Xa Phu
Task.CompleteTalk: Ta chuyen ban cac thao duoc quy, bang huu can loai nao?

Task.Title: Khao Nghiem Cua Chu Truong Tram Kinh
Task.AcceptTalk: Bang huu mua trang bi moi tai dau?
Task.DoingTalk: Trac nghiem cua chu hieu thuoc
Task.QuestionTable: Bang huu mua trang bi moi tai dau?|Than Bi Thuong Nhan Vo Lam Truyen Nhan Tho Ren #Tap Hoa
Task.CompleteTalk: Ngoai ban nhung to lua tot, ta con ban phu trien. Bang huu can trang bi nao?

Task.Title: Khao Nghiem Cua Chu Tiem Tap Hoa
Task.AcceptTalk: Bang huu biet vi nao ban vu khi khong?
Task.DoingTalk: Trac nghiem cua chu tiem tap hoa
Task.QuestionTable: Bang huu biet vi nao ban vu khi khong?|Cong Binh Tu Tien Trang Ban Ngua #Tho Ren
Task.CompleteTalk: Bang huu can binh khi ra sao hay noi voi ta. Ta co the ren tat ca binh khi tren vo lam.

Task.Title: Khao Nghiem Cua Chu Tiem Ren
Task.AcceptTalk: Co mot vi chuyen ban cac nguyen lieu va vat pham quy hiem, bang huu biet la ai khong?
Task.DoingTalk: Trac nghiem cua tho ren
Task.QuestionTable: Co mot vi chuyen ban cac nguyen lieu va vat pham quy hiem, bang huu biet la ai khong?|#Than Bi Thuong Nhan Vo Lam Truyen Nhan Cong Binh Tu Tien Trang
Task.CompleteTalk: Noi day co ban cac bao vat thien ha, bang huu co the lua chon tuy y!

Task.Title: Thuong Nhan Da Quy
Task.AcceptTalk: Bang huu co hieu ve khoang thach khong? Da so bao vat deu duoc tao thanh tu nhung vien khoang! Giup ta thu thap khoang thach o ngoai thanh nhe!
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Thuong Nhan
Task.CompleteTalk: Nhung vien khoang nay chat luong rat tot, bang huu thu thap o dau?

Task.Title: Giup Thuong Nhan Tim Hieu
Task.AcceptTalk: Gan day co mot mo khoang moi khai thac, bang huu co the giup ta tim hieu ve mo khoang nay duoc khong?
Task.DoingTalk: Thu thap khoang thach o tuong duong
Task.CompleteTalk: Mo khoang do cac tang nhan vo tinh phat hien khi trong cay ngoai thanh.

Task.Title: Mo Khoang Trieu Dinh
Task.AcceptTalk: Hien tai do cac tang nhan khai thac, bang huu co the den chua de hoi them!
Task.DoingTalk: Tro chuyen voi tu vu phap su
Task.CompleteTalk: Khai thac mo khoang la chi thi cua thanh chu, thuong nhan co the trao doi voi thanh chu de thu mua, cac tang tu chi ho tro khai thac.

Task.Title: Hoi Bao Thuong Nhan
Task.AcceptTalk: Bac co duoc tu ban khoang thach se xung cong quy, thi chu hay hoi bao voi thuong nhan giup ta.
Task.DoingTalk: Tra loi Than Bi Thuong Nhan
Task.CompleteTalk: Da ta bang huu da hoi giup ta. Day la chut bao thach mong bang huu khong che!

Task.Title: Uu Tu Cua Co Gioi Tien Sinh
Task.AcceptTalk: Moi viec cua ta da duoc giai quyet, Co Gioi Tien Sinh gan day hay uu tu, bang huu tham hoi xem sao!
Task.DoingTalk: Tham hoi co gioi tien sinh
Task.CompleteTalk: Bang huu gan day co ghe ngang Thieu Lam phai khong? o do dang co chut rac roi....

Task.Title: Trau Rung Noi Loan 1/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Cac tieu tang dang luyen tap gan day, bang huu qua xem ho the nao. Mon phai cua ho co chut rac roi voi Trau Rung, hay giup ho giai quyet.
Task.DoingTalk: Danh bai Trau Rung o thieu lam
Task.CompleteTalk: Ton that lan nay khong nho, ta phai bao voi Chuong Mon, bang huu hay doi ta.

Task.Title: Trau Rung Noi Loan 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Chuong mon chuyen loi da ta den bang huu, bang huu thay ta da ta den tien sinh, ngay sao se bao dap an tinh nay!
Task.DoingTalk: Hoi thanh noi chuyen voi co gioi tien sinh
Task.CompleteTalk: Cac tieu tang deu la nguoi cuong dung, vo cong cua ho khong phai hang vua. bang huu con tre ma da giup ho mot an tinh lon, Haha. Tot lam ! Tot lam !

Task.Title: Dung Chien Heo Rung 1/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Heo Rung chuyen di pha hoai cac nong san trong vung. bang huu hay cho chung mot bai hoc
Task.DoingTalk: Danh bai Heo Rung
Task.CompleteTalk: bang huu la bang huu co gioi phai den ho tro chung ta, vo cong rat kha.

Task.Title: Dung Chien Heo Rung 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Thay ta cam ta co gioi, khong con viec gi bang huu hay ve di.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi co gioi tien sinh
Task.CompleteTalk: Mon ha cua giao phai nay it tiep xuc voi dan chung, bang huu dung de y loi noi cua ho....

Task.Title: Tram Tuong Doat Ky 1/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Tho Phi long hanh, cuop doat cua dan ngheo, sao huyet o canh nui con lon, hay giup ta tieu diet chung.
Task.DoingTalk: Danh bai tho phi at o Huong Thuy Dong
Task.CompleteTalk: Danh hay lam, thua thang xong thang len danh bai tan du con lai cua chung !

Task.Title: Tram Tuong Doat Ky 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Dong dang cua chung da rut lui sau vao trong dong, hay tien vao tieu diet nhung ten con lai.
Task.DoingTalk: Danh bai tho phi giap o Huong Thuy Dong
Task.CompleteTalk: Bon tho phi nay long hanh da lau, nho bang huu ra tay tuong tro, sau nay can giup do xin dung ngai!

Task.Title: Anh Hung Tro Lai 1/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Loan da dep yen, duong di xa xoi, bang huu hay khoi hanh keo muon, giup ta chuyen loi hoi tham den co gioi tien sinh.
Task.DoingTalk: Tro ve bao tin cho co gioi tien sinh
Task.CompleteTalk: Xem dang ve phong tran cua bang huu chac di duong rat vat va? Mau vao thanh nghi ngoi!

Task.Title: Anh Hung Tro Lai 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Sau mot thoi gian lich luyen chac bang huu cung tich tru vo so vat pham, hay den gap thu kho Trau Duc Khoai de cat giu, ong ay rat co uy tin trong vo lam.
Task.DoingTalk: Gui vat pham vao thu kho o Tuong Duong
Task.CompleteTalk: Tai ha chuyen luu tru vat pham, bang huu can ta giup luu tru vat pham gi hay dat vao kho, ta se bao quan nguyen ven.

Task.Title: Anh Hung Tro Lai 3/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Giup ta trao tra vat pham cua Long Ngu gui da lau va hoi tham suc kheo cua ong ay. Truoc day ong ay la mot dai hiep, tung hoanh tu phuong....
Task.DoingTalk: Dua tui do cho Long Ngu o Ba Lang Huyen
Task.CompleteTalk: Khong ngo nhung thu nay qua mot thoi gian dai van con nguyen ven, Tran Duc Khoai that danh bat hu truyen, da ta bang huu da mang ve day cho ta!

Task.Title: Anh Hung Tro Lai 4/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Gan day vo cong bang huu da tien trien khong it, hy vong mot ngay khong xa co the giao thu voi bang huu. Thon trang gan day rat yen binh, ta co du cam khong tot, bang huu nen tro lai thanh lon cho tin ta.
Task.DoingTalk: Quay lai tuong duong
Task.CompleteTalk: Tro lai roi a! Moi viec o Ba Lang van on chu, tinh hinh chien loan dang cang thang, hy vong thon dan khong bi anh huong boi the su.

Task.Title: Anh Tai Xuat Chung 1/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Ong chu thu kho co viec muon gap bang huu, hay den gap ong ay ngay di!
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Tran Duc Khoai
Task.CompleteTalk: Lan truoc gap ta da biet bang huu bat pham, su gia dang co dot tuyen chon, bang huu tham gia thu xem...

Task.Title: Tuyen Chon Anh Tai 2/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Trung Nguyen hien nay that nhieu moi nguy, Tuong Duong ta nay phai het long chieu mo nguoi tai . bang huu hay mau den tim Su gia de dang ky!
Task.DoingTalk: Chao hoi su gia lien dau o tuong duong
Task.CompleteTalk: Vi vinh quang cua Tuong Duong! Hay giup trieu dinh tieu diet loan tac, cac vi se co phan thuong.

Task.Title: Tuyen Chon Anh Tai 3/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Loan tac Dong Chuy rat gian xao, bang huu hay can than muu ke cua chung.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet Dong Chuy o Tien Cuc Dong
Task.CompleteTalk: Bang huu khong bi thuong chu? Dong chuy da tieu diet, nhung moi hoa nay van chua dut.

Task.Title: Tuyen Chon Anh Tai 4/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Van con mot dam loan dang lan tron trong dong, mot thon dan tung phat hien duoc bon chung, bang huu den gap ho hoi them ve hanh tung cua chung.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Than Nong Lao Gia
Task.CompleteTalk: Dai hiep muon hoi ve dam nguoi chung ta gap luc truoc? ...........

Task.Title: Tuyen Chon Anh Tai 5/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Bon chung trong rat du ton, chung ta khong dam lai gan. Chung rat dong, tu tap sau trong dong, mong dai hiep hay tieu diet chung giup nguoi dan.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet Bao Hoang o Tien Cuc Dong
Task.CompleteTalk: Dai hiep vo cong that cao cuong! Lao khong co gi bao dap, nhung co mot bi mat se noi cho dai hiep.

Task.Title: Tuyen Chon Anh Tai 6/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Mot lan di nhat cui, lao vo tinh phat hien mot vuon cay la. Lao nong hieu biet it nen khong biet do la loai gi, dai hiep hay den do xem do la loai thuoc gi.
Task.DoingTalk: Hai Linh Chi o ngoai thanh Tuong Duong
Task.CompleteTalk: Lao that khong ngo la Linh Chi trong loi don dai, lao chi nhan mot phan, dai hiep hay giu lay.

Task.Title: Tuyen Chon Anh Tai 7/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Dai hiep da giup dan giai tieu diet ac nhan, lai giup lao dao Linh Chi, dai an khong quen, mong ngay sau gap lai....
Task.DoingTalk: Qua tang su gia
Task.CompleteTalk: Linh Chi tram nam rat hiem,bang huu that su tang cho ta sao?

Task.Title: Thuoc Tri Thuong Cua Su Gia 1/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Bang huu hay giup ta dieu che thanh Linh Dan, ong chu hieu thuoc co don phuong co the giup ta, bang huu hay qua bo sang gap ong ay.
Task.DoingTalk: Gap chu hieu thuoc o tuong duong
Task.CompleteTalk: Dan phuong dieu che da bi trom mat. Neu bang huu tim lai duoc ta se dieu che giup, xem nhu tra no an tinh cho bang huu.

Task.Title: Thuoc Tri Thuong Cua Su Gia 2/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Truoc day ta da nho Thanh Lien Tu truy tim tung tich cua ke trom, bang huu hay den gap han de hoi them, ta cho tin cua bang huu!
Task.DoingTalk: Hoi Thanh Lien Tu o con lon
Task.CompleteTalk: Thieu hiep la nguoi do Tram Kinh tien cu? Ke trom rat gian xao, than thu cao cuong.

Task.Title: Thuoc Tri Thuong Cua Su Gia 3/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Ta tung giao thu voi han, than phap cua han rat nhanh ta khong the bat duoc, han chay ve huong Huong Thuy Dong, thieu hiep nen can than.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu Diet Tho Phi At
Task.CompleteTalk: Lao dai cua bon chung dang giu dan phuong? Vat thi rat kho khan...............

Task.Title: Thuoc Tri Thuong Cua Su Gia 4/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Lao dai cua chung co tieng ac nhan, vo cong khong phai tam thuong, bang huu se rat kho khan de lay lai dan phuong tu han.
Task.DoingTalk: Diet Luu Luong o Huong Thuy Dong
Task.CompleteTalk: That khong ngo, vo cong cua thieu hiep qua khong tam thuong, tai ha da duoc mo rong tam mat.

Task.Title: Thuoc Tri Thuong Cua Su Gia 5/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Dan phuong den tay roi, thieu hiep hay mang ve cho Tram Kinh, han dang rat mong tin cua thieu hiep.
Task.DoingTalk: Tro ve tuong duong gap hieu thuoc
Task.CompleteTalk: That khong phu ky vong cua ta, bang huu cho ta nhe, ta se di dieu che linh dan ngay.

Task.Title: Thuoc Tri Thuong Cua Su Gia 6/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Day la thuoc cua thieu hiep, linh dan la mot loai thuoc rat quy, nhung thoi gian bao quan khong duoc lau, bang huu hay giao ngay cho Su Gia dai nhan.
Task.DoingTalk: Dua thuoc cho Su Gia
Task.CompleteTalk: Bang huu ve that kip thoi, ta dang can linh dan ngay luc nay de dieu tri vet thuong, vet thuong nay da theo ta rat nhieu nam, mot cau chuyen cu.........

Task.Title: Tiep Ung Cai Bang 1/5
Task.AcceptTalk: Dung linh dan vet thuong cua ta da do nhieu roi, that cam ta bang huu da giup ta lay thuoc. Truoc khi xuat hanh bang huu hay den gai Co Gioi Tien Sinh, ngai ay co viec muon dan do bang huu.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi co gioi tien sinh
Task.CompleteTalk: Vet thuong cua Su Gia dai nhan van on chu! Ta co mot nhiem vu cho bang huu....

Task.Title: Tiep Ung Cai Bang 2/5
Task.AcceptTalk: Bang huu hay mau den Cai Bang, o do dang can them nhan si de chong choi voi nan soi hoang, bang huu hay den hieu thuoc nhan chut vat pham tiep te dua sang cho ho,
Task.DoingTalk: Nhan vat pham tiep te o Hieu Thuoc
Task.CompleteTalk: Bang huu cung chuan bi di cuu vien cai bang? Day la chut vat pham tiep te cua ta. Phong tuyen noi do dang rat cang thang, ta mong bang huu hay chuan bi tot

Task.Title: Tiep Ung Cai Bang 3/5
Task.AcceptTalk: Soi la giong loai rat hung hang, ban huu hay can than khi doi dau voi bon chung, bang huu di duong binh anh!
Task.DoingTalk: Dua tiep te cho La Khuong Sinh o Cai Bang
Task.CompleteTalk: Da ta thieu hiep, chong choi voi dan soi nay nhan luc phia ta bi thuong rat nhieu, that su thieu nhung vat pham tri thuong nay!

Task.Title: Tiep Ung Cai Bang 4/5
Task.AcceptTalk: Kien dong can chet voi, bon quai vat noi nay rat dong lai luon rinh rap danh len, nhan si cai bang da bi thuong phan lon, mong thieu hiep tuong tro.
Task.DoingTalk: Danh bai dan Soi Do o Cai Bang
Task.CompleteTalk: Hao cong phu ! Danh hay lam! Nguoi den tu Tuong Duong khong ai tam thuong ca, ta da duoc mo rong tam mat . Hahaha!

Task.Title: Tiep Ung Cai Bang 5/5
Task.AcceptTalk: Thanh Tuong Duong ngoa ho tang long, thay ta da ta co gioi tien sinh, lan sau co co hoi ta se dich than gap ong ay.
Task.DoingTalk: Bao tin ve co gioi tien sinh o Tuong Duong
Task.CompleteTalk: Bang huu lam tot lam, that khong phu ky vong cua ta, ta co nhiem vu khac mong bang huu tiep nhan.

Task.Title: Ren Luyen Than The 1/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Bang huu da vo cong kha hon nhieu roi, viec can thiet hien tai la ren luyen than the, nang cao suc manh cua nhuc the se tang manh ve phong thu. Ta biet mot noi co the giup bang huu ren luyen.
Task.DoingTalk: Danh bai Soi Tuyet o phuc nguu son
Task.CompleteTalk: Tot lam, vo cong muon tang tien thi can mot nhuc than cung ran, nen tang cang vung chac thi noi luc cang tham hau.

Task.Title: Ren Luyen Than The 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Ung co than thu nhanh nhen, vo cong quy di. Khong it hao thu cua ta bi da bai, bang huu co the dung no de kiem tra can cot hien tai cua minh....
Task.DoingTalk: Danh bai Thuong Ung o thanh thanh son
Task.CompleteTalk: That khong ngoai du doan cua ta, hien tai bang huu co the nhan nhung thu thach nguy hiem hon, ta tin bang huu van co the bao toan dc ban menh.

Task.Title: Quyen Truc Chien Bao 1/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Quyen truc chien bao da bi quan Kim cuop, bang huu hay den gap de tu cai bang tim hieu.
Task.DoingTalk: Tim La Tuan o Ba Lang Huyen
Task.CompleteTalk: Bang huu do co gioi tien sinh phai den phai khong! tinh hinh dang rat nguy cap! Quyen truc chua dung thong tin quan trong ve quan ta, can phai mang ve.

Task.Title: Quyen Truc Chien Bao 2/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Truong lao cai bang di dieu tra ve quan Kim da tro lai, bang huu hay den cai bang gap ong ay.
Task.DoingTalk: Den cai bang gap nguy lieu ong
Task.CompleteTalk: Trong qua trinh theo doi chung,den thanh thanh son quan Kim gap tap kich tai lung chung nui, khong mot ke nao song xot, la mot dam quai dieu.................

Task.Title: Quyen Truc Chien Bao 3/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Ta de lai mot nguoi de theo doi hanh tung bon quai dieu, hay den day han se chi to quai dieu cho bang huu.
Task.DoingTalk: Den thanh thanh son gap De tu cai bang
Task.CompleteTalk: Bon chung da giet toan bo binh linh Kim quoc va an thit ho. Quyen truc van trong to cua bon chung.

Task.Title: Quyen Truc Chien Bao 4/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Dam quai vat nay dang chuan bi di tim thuc an, bang huu hay chop thoi co tan cong luc chung khong tap trung, quyen truc phai duoc thu hoi.
Task.DoingTalk: Danh bai Ken Ken o thanh thanh son
Task.CompleteTalk: Bang huu lam tot lam, lu quai dieu da so hay bo chay, quyen truc da thu thap hoi du roi chu.

Task.Title: Quyen Truc Chien Bao 5/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Quyen truc da ve tay, bang huu cap toc giao lai cho truong lao, ta se o lai theo doi them. Len duong binh an!
Task.DoingTalk: Giao quyen truc cho Nguy Lieu Ong
Task.CompleteTalk: Qua tot! qua tot! vat pham nay lien quan den an nguy cua muon dan, bang huu da giup do dan chung mot viec lon.

Task.Title: Quyen Truc Chien Bao 6/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Bang huu giup ta thong bao cho La Tuan, han dang rat lo lang ve quyen truc.
Task.DoingTalk: Bao tin cho La Tuan o Ba Lang Huyen
Task.CompleteTalk: Bang huu la cuu tinh cua dan chung, bang huu cua co gioi tien sinh luon khien ta phai nguoc nhin.

Task.Title: Quyen Truc Chien Bao 7/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Bang huu chac han da met moi nhieu, hay nghi ngoi roi quay lai bao tin cho co giuoi tien sinh.
Task.DoingTalk: Bao tin cho co gioi tien sinh o tuong duong
Task.CompleteTalk: Ngoai bang huu ra, khong ai co the hoan thanh tot nhiem vu nguy hiem nay.

Task.Title: Tham Quan Bien Kinh 1/8
Task.AcceptTalk: Gan day Bien Kinh rat nhon nhip, Bien Kinh la thanh lon phia bac, bang huu nen thuong xuyen ghe tham de hoc hoi van hoa cua nguoi phuong bac. Hay gap xa phu, ong ta se giup bang huu chuan bi mot con ngua tot.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi tap hoa o tuong duong
Task.CompleteTalk: Bien Kinh la trung tam giao dich cua phuong bac, ngoai mua ban cac vat pham dac thu, con co trao doi tin tuc quan trong.

Task.Title: Tham Quan Bien Kinh 2/8
Task.AcceptTalk: O bien kinh ta quen mot co nuong co the huong dan ngai tham quan, ngai cung co the hoi tham tin tuc tu co ay.
Task.DoingTalk: Khoi hanh den bien kinh gap Binh Binh Co Nuong
Task.CompleteTalk: Chao dai hiep, ngai moi den chac con la lam ve noi day! Thanh Bien Kinh la mot trong tam dai thanh thi, luong hang hoa cung nhu tin tuc la vo cung lon.

Task.Title: Tham Quan Bien Kinh 3/8
Task.AcceptTalk: Dai hiep hay dao quanh thanh, nguoi dan se ke them cho dai hiep ve van hoa noi day.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Tho Ren
Task.CompleteTalk: Tho ren tai bien kinh co tay nghe tot nhat trong tam dai thanh thi, ho da ren ra nhung vu khi co tieng tam nhu, Pha Thien Kich, Huyen Thiet Kiem.........

Task.Title: Tham Quan Bien Kinh 4/8
Task.AcceptTalk: Ngoai binh khi, bien kinh con co nhung mat hang tieng tam khac, neu can ren binh khi dai hiep hay den tim ta.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi chu hieu thuoc
Task.CompleteTalk: Thao duoc phuong bac da dang, co the dieu che ra nhieu loai thuoc dac hieu chi co ban tai phuong bac.

Task.Title: Tham Quan Bien Kinh 5/8
Task.AcceptTalk: Ben canh ta cung co mot so mat hang vai voc, khi can thuoc tot dai hiep hay den tim ta.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi chu tap hoa
Task.CompleteTalk: Trang bi cho ta ban noi danh khap thanh Bien Kinh, ngoai ra ta cung thu mua nguyen vat lieu voi gia tot, dai hiep hay can nhac.

Task.Title: Tham Quan Bien Kinh 6/8
Task.AcceptTalk: Bien Kinh co nhuung thuong buon ngua, dai hiep co the tim cho minh mot thu cuoi ung y.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Ban Ngua
Task.CompleteTalk: Ta co the cung cap mot so luong lon thu cuoi cho dai hiep, ngoai ra con mot so ngua quy, dai hiep can rat nhieu bac de mua duoc chung!

Task.Title: Tham Quan Bien Kinh 7/8
Task.AcceptTalk: Dai hiep chac la nguoi moi den, dai hiep nen ghe qua Thu Kho, ong ay tiep xuc rrat nhieu nguoi o day, co le dai hiep se thich tin hcach ong ay.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Trau Duc Khoai
Task.CompleteTalk: Xin chao dai hiep, nguoi moi den day phai khong? Bien Kinh dat rong, nguoi dong dai hiep can dieu gi co the tim ta.

Task.Title: Tham Quan Bien Kinh 8/8
Task.AcceptTalk: Dai hiep co the quay lai sau neu can, hien tai nguoi can lam quen voi cuoc song noi day, mot thanh thi nhon nhip.
Task.DoingTalk: Tro ve gap Binh Binh Co Nuong
Task.CompleteTalk: Dai hiep cam thay the nao, cuoc song noi phon hoa luon lam nhung nguoi moi den ngo ngang.

Task.Title: Giup Do Truong Qua Phu 1/5
Task.AcceptTalk: Noi day dia linh nhan kiet, cac loai hoa co quy hiem co the bat gap bat cu dau o ngoai thanh, ngai co the giup ta tim mot it nhan sam khong?
Task.DoingTalk: Giup Binh Binh Co Nuong thu thap Nhan Sam
Task.CompleteTalk: Dai hiep lam viec that nhanh gon, gan day Truong Qua Phu cung co nhieu viec can giup do, nhung phu quan ba ay da qua doi.......

Task.Title: Giup Do Truong Qua Phu 2/5
Task.AcceptTalk: Truong qua phu la lang gieng cua ta rat lau roi, mong dai hiep hay giup do ba ta mot so viec.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Truong Qua Phu
Task.CompleteTalk: Dai Hiep den tu Tuong Duong! Noi do cung sinh ra nhieu vi anh kiet noi danh vo lam.

Task.Title: Giup Do Truong Qua Phu 3/5
Task.AcceptTalk: Gan day trong nha da khong con thuc pham, nhung ta than la nu nhi, khong the mot minh ra ngoai tim thuc an cho hai tu, ngai co the giup ta khong?
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet Doi Xam o Thien Nhan Giao
Task.CompleteTalk: Dai Hiep that tot bung! Co viec gi ta co the giup do xin dai hiep cu noi, may va nau nuong ta deu co the giup.

Task.Title: Giup Do Truong Qua Phu 4/5
Task.AcceptTalk: Thay ra cam ta loi giup do cua Binh Binh co nuong, hen gap lai dai hiep!
Task.DoingTalk: Hoi chuyen Binh Binh Co Nuong
Task.CompleteTalk: Hai tu cua truong qua phu rat thich an thit heo rung, neu co the dai hiep hay tim mot chut tang cho no.

Task.Title: Giup Do Truong Qua Phu 5/5
Task.AcceptTalk: Heo Rung la loai vat co rat nhieu o chan nui vo dang, chung sinh san rat nhanh, co the tro thanh mot dai hoa.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet Heo Rung o vo dang
Task.CompleteTalk: Dai Hiep that chu dao! Thit heo nay hai tu nha ta rat thich! Gan day ta nghe duoc mot so chuyen phia bac thanh.

Task.Title: Ac Thu Can Duong 1/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Trong thanh co mot tin tuc dan chung truyen tai nhau, co mot so ac thu dang gay nguy hiem cho dan buon khi di ngang nui Hoa Son.
Task.DoingTalk: Hoi chuyen Binh Binh Co Nuong
Task.CompleteTalk: Qua that co tin tuc nhu vat! Cu the dam ac thu do hoat dong o tren Diem Thuong Son

Task.Title: Ac Thu Can Duong 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Dai hiep di doc cac duong mon, den thung lung co the gap chung, do la tuyen duong buon cua cac thuong nhan.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet Nhan Kinh Xa o Diem Thuong Son
Task.CompleteTalk: Chung la loai ran doc, co chut linh tri, rat nguy hiem, may nho co dai hiep thu phuc.

Task.Title: Ac Thu Can Duong 3/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Nhung nguy hiem do khong chi den tu nhung con ran doc, ngai hay noi chuyen voi chu tiem do co, ong ta cung la nan nhan cua ac thu diem thuong son
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi ong chu do co
Task.CompleteTalk: Mot doan tuy tung cua ta da bi tan cong, ton that khong he nho, chung di theo tung dan, tan cong moi phia. Da chung rat day, binh khi cua chung ta khong the ton thuong duoc chung, mong dai hiep ra tay truong nghia.

Task.Title: Ac Thu Can Duong 4/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Theo ha nhan cua ta ke lai, chung thuong tap trung tai gan tuyen duong buon hang cua thuong nhan, dai hiep den ngoi nha hoang se thay chung.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet Xa Li o diem thuong son
Task.CompleteTalk: Da ta dai hiep da tra thu giup nhung ha nhan gap nan cua ta, dai hiep sau nay can gi giup do hay den tim ta.

Task.Title: Ket Giao Voi Dai Nhan Vat 1/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Ta nghe noi ong chu song bac xin gap dai hiep. Dai hiep nen ket giao voi han, han co quan het rat rong trong thanh!
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi chu song bac o bien kinh
Task.CompleteTalk: Tram nghe khong bang mat thay! dai hiep khi chat phi pham, qua la mot quy nhan. Ta co chut viec nho muon dai hiep giup do.

Task.Title: Ket Giao Voi Dai Nhan Vat 2/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Gan day dai hiep da noi danh o Bien Kinh, tren diem thuong son ngoai ac thu con co mot loai khi hiem, da cua chung rat tot. Dai hiep co the giup ta thu thap khong?
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet Hac Diep Hau o diem thuong son
Task.CompleteTalk: Chat luong da rat tot, ta co the lam duoc nhieu vat pham gia tri tu chung, da ta dai hiep!

Task.Title: Ket Giao Voi Dai Nhan Vat 3/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Tai thanh bien kinh, dai hiep muon dung vung phai ket giao voi mot so nguoi nhat dinh. Ta se chi diem giup dai hiep , dau tien nen ke den dich dung thuat si, han la mot trong nhung ke dung dau cuong dao o bien kinh.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Dich Dung Thuat Si
Task.CompleteTalk: Nguoi la nguoi moi noi danh gan day? Noi day hoa no hoa tan chi chop nhoang, nguoi nen bao trong!

Task.Title: Ket Giao Voi Dai Nhan Vat 4/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Nguoi giup ta mot viec, ta se gioi thieu nguoi voi ban cua ta, ong ta se giup ich rat nhieu cho nguoi moi nhuu nguoi. Giao mat na nay cho ba chu thanh lau giup ta.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Vuong Phu Nhan
Task.CompleteTalk: Nguoi den giao mat na sao! Nguoi rat khoi ngo, co muon lam ha nhan ben canh ta khong?

Task.Title: Ket Giao Voi Dai Nhan Vat 5/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Ta chi dua voi nguoi mot chut thoi! Bao voi thuat si ta se bao dap khi han den day choi.
Task.DoingTalk: Tro ve gap Dich Dung Thuat Si
Task.CompleteTalk: Tot! Vuong phu nhan la nguoi rat hao phong, ba ta tuy la phan nu nhi, nhung la chu nhan thuc su cua thanh lau lon nhat bien kinh nay.

Task.Title: Ket Giao Voi Dai Nhan Vat 6/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Den thanh lau chac nguoi da gap qua Hoang Dai Thieu, han la con trai lon cua vien ngoai. Moi tin tuc trong thanh deu den tai han dau tien, hay den ket giao voi han.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Hoang Dai Thieu
Task.CompleteTalk: Nghe danh bang huu da lau! vo cong thuong thua! than phap nhanh nhen. That han hanh duoc ket giao voi cac ha.

Task.Title: Tuyet Pham Binh Khi 1/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Ban su ta khong thich dai dong, ta co nhiem vu mot nhiem vu. Ta dang can mot thanh binh khi tot, bang huu am hieu ve vu khi hon ta, hay giup ta tim mot thanh binh khi tot.
Task.DoingTalk: Gap tho ren o bien kinh
Task.CompleteTalk: Binh khi tot ta co the che tao, nhung truoc tien ta can mot it nguyen lieu, bang huu hay giup ta thu thap chung.

Task.Title: Tuyet Pham Binh Khi 2/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Binh khi cua thiet trao co chua kim loai quy, mot trong nhung nguyen lieu ta can, hay di lay ve day.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet Thiet Trao o Tien cuc dong
Task.CompleteTalk: Bang huu than thu rat tot, trong thoi gian ngan da thu thap rrat nhieu mong vuot cua chung, nhung van con mot so nguyen lieu khac

Task.Title: Tuyet Pham Binh Khi 3/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Song phu cua luu luong cung la thu ta can de tach lay nguyen lieu, hay di thu thap no ve.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet Luu Luong o Huong Thuy Dong
Task.CompleteTalk: Tot lam, luu luong noi tieng suc manh cuong bao, khong ngo vo cong cua bang huu loi hai den vay!

Task.Title: Tuyet Pham Binh Khi 4/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Thoi gian ren binh khi kha lau, bang huu co the giup ta mot viec? Giup ta gui vien ngoc quy nay cho Truong Qua Phu.
Task.DoingTalk: Giao qua cho Truong Qua Phu
Task.CompleteTalk: Yen huynh va ta la thanh mai truc ma tu nho, nhung phan nu nhi khong quyet dinh duoc hon su cua minh....

Task.Title: Tuyet Pham Binh Khi 5/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Dai hiep hay noi voi Yen huynh dung cho doi ta nua, da ta dai hiep!
Task.DoingTalk: Tra loi cho Ha Phi Yen
Task.CompleteTalk: Cuoc song khong ai co the nhu y, ta chi hy vong co ay co the yen on song moi ngay, da ta bang huu da giup do ta.

Task.Title: Tuyet Pham Binh Khi 6/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Vu khi cua bang huu da ren xong, day la vu khi ta ung y nhat trong nam nay, hy vong chu nhan cua no se lam nen ten tuoi.
Task.DoingTalk: Giao vu khi cho Hoang Dai Thieu
Task.CompleteTalk: Bang huu khong phu ky vong cua ta, qua that la mot thanh kiem tuyet pham, ta se nghi mot cai ten cho no " Tuyet Pham....."

Task.Title: Cau than 1/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Nga Mi Son, khong biet co bao nhieu thieu nu bi chon vui trong ngon nui phat gia nay. Dem khuya nghi ve hong tran, nghi ve co nhan khong the nao quen. Bang huu hay giup ta noi chuyen voi
Task.DoingTalk: Doi Thoai voi Hoang Dai Thieu
Task.CompleteTalk: Hoang dai thieu biet Nga My gioi luat nghiem ngat. Nhung nam truoc luc o Thanh Do, tinh co gap go de tu tuc gia Nga My, Tien Tu....

Task.Title: Cau than 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Ngay nho dem ong, khong co cach nao yen giac. Nguoi hay giup ta ket thong gia voi su phu cua Phong Nhan.
Task.DoingTalk: Gap bai nguyet tien tu o nga mi
Task.CompleteTalk: Hoang Dai Thieu? Co nghe Tien Tu nhac den, nhung viec nay tot nhat coi nhu chua tung xay ra, ta bat luan the nao cung khong the dong y.

Task.Title: Cau than 3/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Nguoi la nguoi mai moi, hay giup ta di Diem Thuong giet Hac Diep Hau, Cat tai cua chung, de chung minh thuc luc cua nguoi.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet Hac Diep Hau o diem thuong son
Task.CompleteTalk: Tot lam.......!

Task.Title: Cau than 4/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Nguoi noi voi Hoang Dai Thieu, neu muon cuoi Tien Tu, lay thu cap cua 3 van con Hac Diep, tru hai cho Nga My ta, thi ta se ga Tien Tu cho han.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Hoang Dai Thieu
Task.CompleteTalk: Cai gi! 3 van con, lao ni xao quyet...ro rang ba ta muon lam kho de ta! De ta suy nghi lai.

Task.Title: Nga My Co Su 1/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Da ta bang huu da giup ta, ta se suy nghi ky ve de nghi cua Bai Nguyet Tien Tu, hen ngay gap lai!
Task.DoingTalk: Tro lai noi chuyen voi Dich Dung Thuat Si
Task.CompleteTalk: 30 nam truoc, That Tien Tu nui Nga My dung nhan tuyet the lam nghieng nga giang ho, 30 nam doi nguoi thay doi, den nay cau chuyen ve nhung thieu nu do da tro thanh truyen thuyet tuyet dep. Ta luon hy vong tim duoc nhung chuyen xay ra ve sau cua That Tien Tu.

Task.Title: Nga My Co Su 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Co duyen rat tinh co, mot hom Nga My Phai Thanh Hieu su thai xuong nui, trong luc tu hanh bi ke cap lay het tien bac. Trong luc kho khan lai gap duoc ta, giup do ba ta chut tien. Ve sau moi biet, viec do lien quan den su song chet cua Nga My Phai. Cho nen di tim Thanh Hieu su thai hoi tham, nhan an hue cua ta, ba ta khong the khuoc tu.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi chuong mon nga mi
Task.CompleteTalk: A Di Da Phat, thoi duoc, viec nay khong the che giau mai, cu de nguoi luong thien nhu Thuat Si ghi cheo lai cho doi sau.

Task.Title: Nga My Co Su 3/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Sach da giao cho Nga My ha vien cat giu tu lau, nghe noi da bi trom boi Kim To Hau o sau ha vien, nguoi co the di tim thu lai, nhung Kim To Hau tinh nghich, lam viec nay co thuan loi hay khong con tuy vao ban linh cua nguoi.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet Kim To Hau o nga mi
Task.CompleteTalk: Chung rat tinh nghich, hay trom do trong ha vien, nhung chung o day cung da lau, ta cung khong muon thay chung bien mat.

Task.Title: Nga My Co Su 4/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Hay ve bao cho Thuat Si!
Task.DoingTalk: Tro lai noi chuyen voi Dich Dung thuat si o bien kinh
Task.CompleteTalk: Tot lam. bay gio hay tim gap Thanh Hieu Su Thai, ba ay co dieu muon pho thac.

Task.Title: Pho Thac Cua Su Thai 1/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Ba ay con mot so chuyen giao cho ta, nhung gan day ta rat nhieu viec, nguoi hay thay ta nhan pho thac.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Thanh Hieu su thai o nga mi
Task.CompleteTalk: Dam Xa Li ngay cang qua dang.

Task.Title: Pho Thac Cua Su Thai 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Nguoi thay ta di day cho chung biet dieu mot chut.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet xa li o diem thuong son
Task.CompleteTalk: Chung that su co ban linh khong coi ai ra gi, lan nay coi nhu la giao huan mot chut.

Task.Title: Pho Thac Cua Su Thai 3/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Nguoi da giup ta giai quyet rac toi, nhung ta van con mot viec khac giao cho nguoi, mot nguoi ban cua ta o con lon dang can giup do, hay den do.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Than Tuc Lao Nhan o con lon
Task.CompleteTalk: Vao mot dem mua, Thu Thach tien sinh mot minh di den tay Con Lon, lang le vac mot goi do trang tinh, ben trong la tin vat chuong mon cua phai Con Lon, Lac Anh Than Kiem. Goc gac cua ong ta that than bi, viec nay can phai co cau tra loi.

Task.Title: Lai Lich Tong Thu Thach 1/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Neu noi tren the gian nay con co nguoi biet lai lich cua chuong mon, thi nguoi do khong ai khac chinh la lao tien boi cua Con Lon la Dong Tich Nhan.
Task.DoingTalk: Tiep tuc Doi Thoai voi Thac Tuc Lao Nhan
Task.CompleteTalk: Nguoi co the den Kien Tinh Phong de tim ba ta, va noi de tu ngu muoi Ta Vu Dien thinh giao.

Task.Title: Lai Lich Tong Thu Thach 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Den nha nho cua Con Lon, tim chuong quan <color=#FFCC00>Dong Tich Nhan</color>, neu may man, ba ta se ke lai vai dieu.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Dong Tich Nhan o con lon
Task.CompleteTalk: Kha kha, khong can noi. Ta da som biet khong som thi muon nguoi cung den tim ta.

Task.Title: Lai Lich Tong Thu Thach 3/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Ve chuyen cua nguoi, nguoi hay den tim de tu cua ta Ngoc Hoanh Tu, co mot nguoi chinh la con gai cua Tong Thu Thach.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Ngoc Hoanh Tu
Task.CompleteTalk: Con gai Thu Thach tien sinh Tong Qua Nhi la nu de tu o day, song duong nhu su phu, dang tham do y tu cua ta.

Task.Title: Lai Lich Tong Thu Thach 4/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Von di, Thu Thach tien sinh chinh la mon ha cua Con Lon, nhu the thi qua la may man cho Con Lon ta roi!
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Chu Khuyet o con lon
Task.CompleteTalk: 10 nam truoc, nhung mon nhan kiet xuat nhat trong Con Lon la Toan Co Tu, Thanh Lien Tu, Ngoc Hoanh Tu xay ra luc duc voi nhau.

Task.Title: Hoa Son Chi Chung 1/8
Task.AcceptTalk: Ho tan sat nhau ma khong phat hien ra co tuyet lo gan do, vo so de tu tinh anh deu bi vui trong nui tuyet.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Dong Tich Nham o con lon
Task.CompleteTalk: Mua xuan sap den roi, ta muon de tu trong bang den Hoa Son de cung te to tien va cho ho biet, cho du kho khan den muc nao cung khong nen lam loan.

Task.Title: Hoa Son Chi Chung 2/8
Task.AcceptTalk: Bi kich do khong duoc tai dien, ta can nguoi giup ta di tien tram. Xem co nguy hiem gi phat sinh khong!
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi de tu con lon
Task.CompleteTalk: Oi, o day mua dong gia lanh, may hom truoc khong co thit de an, ta len vao Huong Thuy Dong trom mot it thit tuoi cua bon chung.

Task.Title: Hoa Son Chi Chung 3/8
Task.AcceptTalk: Bon chung rat gian du, khong can noi nhieu, mau giup ta giai quyet bon ac nhan nua nay di.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu Diet Luu Luong
Task.CompleteTalk: Vi gianh thuc an voi , bi don vao son coc, cam on bang huu giup ta giai quyet hiem nguy nay.

Task.Title: Hoa Son Chi Chung 4/8
Task.AcceptTalk: Nguoi hay den choThon Dan xem ho can giup gi khong.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Lao Mo Dung
Task.CompleteTalk: Nhac them xau ho....Bon Tho Phi that ngang nguoc.

Task.Title: Hoa Son Chi Chung 5/8
Task.AcceptTalk: Lao gia yeu khong lam gi duoc. Hy vong nguoi co the giup lao.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet Tho Phi At o huong thuy dong
Task.CompleteTalk: Vay la lao yen tam roi, sau nay se con con lo lang ve dem, da ta thieu hiep.

Task.Title: Hoa Son Chi Chung 6/8
Task.AcceptTalk: Hay sang noi chuyen voi tieu ngu, sau hom di hai thuoc gan hang dong, no luon buon rau.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Tieu Ngu
Task.CompleteTalk: Oi... Ta quanh nam o tren Hoa Son nay, ngay ca me cung khong cham soc duoc. May hom truoc ba ay den tham ta. Nhung giua duong bi bon Tho Phi treu choc

Task.Title: Hoa Son Chi Chung 7/8
Task.AcceptTalk: Phien ca ca giup ta day do bon chung
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet Tho Phi giap o huong thuy dong
Task.CompleteTalk: Da ta ca ca! Bay giuo tieu ngu khong so khi di hai thuoc gan dong nua roi.

Task.Title: Hoa Son Chi Chung 8/8
Task.AcceptTalk: Thuc thuc cua ta dang kinh doanh tai thanh Tuong Duong, Ca Ca giup ta gui phan banh nay den cho nguoi nhe!
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Truong Tram Kinh
Task.CompleteTalk: Tieu hai tu cua muoi muoi ta tuoi con nho nhung that hieu chuyen!

Task.Title: Y Chi Cua Thanh Chu 1/13
Task.AcceptTalk: Ta thay co tieng phi phi rat la tu phia bac thanh, bang huu di xem ai do tro gi.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Cong Binh Tu
Task.CompleteTalk: Thieu hiep, chung ta gap nhau roi, lan truoc bang huu lap duoc cong lon, moi nguoi deu tan duong bang huu. Ta se cho bang huu mot danh hieu, de xem nao .....

Task.Title: Y Chi Cua Thanh Chu 2/13
Task.AcceptTalk: bang huu hay loi cua ta thong bao cho chuong mon cac phai phong bi, dau tien hay den Cai Bang.
Task.DoingTalk: Truyen thong bao cua Cong Binh Tu
Task.CompleteTalk: Ta da hieu.

Task.Title: Y Chi Cua Thanh Chu 3/13
Task.AcceptTalk: Ta da hieu. Hay den gap chuong mon Con Lon
Task.DoingTalk: Den Con Lon
Task.CompleteTalk: Ta da hieu.

Task.Title: Y Chi Cua Thanh Chu 4/13
Task.AcceptTalk: Ta da hieu. Hay den gap chuong mon Duong Mon
Task.DoingTalk: Den Duong Mon
Task.CompleteTalk: Ta da hieu.

Task.Title: Y Chi Cua Thanh Chu 5/13
Task.AcceptTalk: Ta da hieu. Hay den gap chuong mon Nga Mi
Task.DoingTalk: Den Nga Mi
Task.CompleteTalk: Ta da hieu.

Task.Title: Y Chi Cua Thanh Chu 6/13
Task.AcceptTalk: Ta da hieu. Hay den gap chuong mon Ngu Doc
Task.DoingTalk: Den Ngu Doc
Task.CompleteTalk: Ta da hieu.

Task.Title: Y Chi Cua Thanh Chu 7/13
Task.AcceptTalk: Ta da hieu. Hay den gap chuong mon Thien Vuong
Task.DoingTalk: Den Thien Vuong
Task.CompleteTalk: Ta da hieu.

Task.Title: Y Chi Cua Thanh Chu 8/13
Task.AcceptTalk: Ta da hieu. Hay den gap chuong mon Thieu Lam
Task.DoingTalk: Den Thieu Lam
Task.CompleteTalk: Ta da hieu.

Task.Title: Y Chi Cua Thanh Chu 9/13
Task.AcceptTalk: Ta da hieu. Hay den gap chuong mon Thuy Yen
Task.DoingTalk: Den Thuy Yen
Task.CompleteTalk: Ta da hieu.

Task.Title: Y Chi Cua Thanh Chu 10/13
Task.AcceptTalk: Ta da hieu. Hay den gap chuong mon Vo Dang
Task.DoingTalk: Den Vo Dang
Task.CompleteTalk: Ta da hieu.

Task.Title: Y Chi Cua Thanh Chu 11/13
Task.AcceptTalk: Ta da hieu. Hay den gap chuong mon Hoa Son
Task.DoingTalk: Den Hoa Son
Task.CompleteTalk: Ta da hieu.

Task.Title: Y Chi Cua Thanh Chu 12/13
Task.AcceptTalk: Ta da hieu. Hay den gap chuong mon Thien Nhan
Task.DoingTalk: Den Thien Nhan
Task.CompleteTalk: bang huu lam tot lam

Task.Title: Y Chi Cua Thanh Chu 13/13
Task.AcceptTalk: Hay quay ve bao tin cua ta cho Cong Binh dai nhan
Task.DoingTalk: Tro ve bao tin
Task.CompleteTalk: Moi nguoi deu nhan duoc thong bao cua ta, hien tai chi cho hoi am cua ho ....

Task.Title: Tuyet canh bong lai 1/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Su gia cua chung ta tu Dai Tong tro ve tren duong gap Soi Trang tan cong, bang huu hay den giup y
Task.DoingTalk: Giai cuu thuong nhan bi Soi Trang bao vay
Task.CompleteTalk: Ta on troi dat co nguoi den cuu ta roi, neu bang huu khong den coi nhu ta xong doi roi

Task.Title: Tuyet canh bong lai 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Chang trai, khong co viec ban co the giup ta tieu diet dan Bao nay ?
Task.DoingTalk: Giup su gia giai quyet Bao trang nguy hiem.
Task.CompleteTalk: Than thu that phi pham....!

Task.Title: Tuyet canh bong lai 3/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Giup ta trao phan Da Bao nay nhu mot loi cam on den Cong Binh Tu!
Task.DoingTalk: Qua Cam Ta
Task.CompleteTalk: Su Gia da thoat khoi nguy hiem, bang huu da giup ta mot viec lon.

Task.Title: Thuong Nhan Gap Nan 1/9
Task.AcceptTalk: Soi Vang dang ham hai cac thuong buon, bang huu hay den tim hieu tinh hinh..
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet Soi Vang tru hai cho dan

Task.Title: Thuong Nhan Gap Nan 2/9
Task.AcceptTalk: bang huu hay quay lai gap Co Gioi Tien Sinh, ong ay co viec tim bang huu.
Task.DoingTalk: Tim gap Tien Sinh
Task.CompleteTalk: Dai Hiep day roi, gan day quanh vung nui co nhieu su viec la, vat nuoi va cay trong bi ton that.....!

Task.Title: Thuong Nhan Gap Nan 3/9
Task.AcceptTalk: Dai Hiep den gap chu tiem Tap Hoa, ong ay co nguoi than o tren nui.
Task.DoingTalk: Su La Tren Nui
Task.CompleteTalk: Chau trai ta bao tin ve mot loai thu du, gay nguy hiem cho cu dan tren nui Hoa Son, Dai Hiep co the tim no de chi duong.

Task.Title: Thuong Nhan Gap Nan 4/9
Task.AcceptTalk: Chai ta ten Dau Dau, dang o lu quan, Dai Hiep co the tim Dau Dau dan duong len nui, co nguoi thong thuoc dia hinh se tranh duoc nguy hiem.
Task.DoingTalk: Tien len nui Hoa Son
Task.CompleteTalk: Ca ca la nguoi giup thon cua de tieu diet Linh Mieu?

Task.Title: Thuong Nhan Gap Nan 5/9
Task.AcceptTalk: Ca ca chung ta di thoi, moi nguoi dang cho chung ta!
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi thon dan
Task.CompleteTalk: Cuu tinh toi roi, may ngay gan day chung toi song trong lo lang, bon chung rat hung giu, Tieu Son suyt mat mang....!

Task.Title: Thuong Nhan Gap Nan 6/9
Task.AcceptTalk: Dai Hiep hay hoi con ta, no may man tron duoc dot tan cong.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu Son chi diem
Task.CompleteTalk: Ca ca con vat do than dai, da vang rat hung du, ca ca hay giup dan lang tieu diet chung!

Task.Title: Thuong Nhan Gap Nan 7/9
Task.AcceptTalk: Chung thuong o trung tam thung lung, ca ca co the bat gap duoc neu di ve phia do.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet Linh Mieu
Task.CompleteTalk: That la tot qua roi, dan lang tu nay se duoc yen on, cam on Dai Hiep.

Task.Title: Thuong Nhan Gap Nan 8/9
Task.AcceptTalk: Dan lang se to chuc buoi tiec chieu dai Dai Hiep
Task.DoingTalk: Coi chuyen voi tieu ngu
Task.CompleteTalk: Ca ca co quay lai nua ko?

Task.Title: Thuong Nhan Gap Nan 9/9
Task.AcceptTalk: Lon len Ngu nhi se giong ca ca, la mot Dai Hiep giup dan tru hai, ca ca hay quay lai nhe....!
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi chu tiem tap hoa
Task.CompleteTalk: That la may man vi co su giup do cua Dai Hiep, ta co chut qua mong ngai khong che.

Task.Title: Co Quan Bao Vat 1/11
Task.AcceptTalk: Dai Hiep can trang bi tot hay lien he ta, se ban cho Dai Hiep voi gia tot nhat....!
Task.DoingTalk: Thong bao cho co gioi Tien Sinh
Task.CompleteTalk: That khong don gian, hy vong chi la mot dan Linh Mieu , song gio sap ap toi roi....

Task.Title: Co Quan Bao Vat 2/11
Task.AcceptTalk: Tri thuc la suc manh! Hay den gap Vo Lam Truyen Nhan, ong ay co the chi diem cho Dai Hiep.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen tham hiem voi Vo Lam Truyen Nhan
Task.CompleteTalk: Cai Bang la thien ha de nhat bang, giu duoc long ho viec giu thien ha khong kho. bang huu hay den do giao luu mot chuyen !

Task.Title: Co Quan Bao Vat 3/11
Task.AcceptTalk: Nguoi Cai Bang trong nghia, vo tu tieu dao, tuy nhien tran phap rat cao cuong .Noi do thuong xay ra giao chien, thieu hiep hay de phong.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi ha nhan nga o cai bang
Task.CompleteTalk: Tong Truong Lao da den Hoa Lang Dong truoc, hao han hay den gap ong ay xem co the giup gi

Task.Title: Co Quan Bao Vat 4/11
Task.AcceptTalk: Yen Tu Dong nay co rat nhieu co quan, bang huu hay can than, lo dang chut la mat mang day.
Task.DoingTalk: Tham hiem Hoa Lang Dong
Task.CompleteTalk: Cai bang lay su doan ket lam trong, vi vay bang chung cai bang luon thau hieu cac tran phap ao dieu!

Task.Title: Co Quan Bao Vat 5/11
Task.AcceptTalk: Nguoi cua Cai bang di tien phong tim hieu tinh hinh, bang huu hay tim y.
Task.DoingTalk: Tro giup Vo Lam Truyen Nhan.
Task.CompleteTalk: Cac de tu cai bang dang bi Soi du bua vay, mong cac ha tuong tro .

Task.Title: Co Quan Bao Vat 6/11
Task.AcceptTalk: Quy nhan den Cai Bang choi, lai gap nhieu chuyen chang hay. That la ho then, ho then !
Task.DoingTalk: Tro giup Tong truong lao, tieu diet Soi xam
Task.CompleteTalk: Haha, cac ha danh chung rat suong tay day !

Task.Title: Co Quan Bao Vat 7/11
Task.AcceptTalk: Sau trong dong con co co quan, chung ta hay tien vao tim hieu
Task.DoingTalk: Vao sau trong dong Hoa Lang
Task.CompleteTalk: Thu thap duoc co quan se lap cong lon cho Cai Bang!

Task.Title: Co Quan Bao Vat 8/11
Task.AcceptTalk: Xung quanh co quan co nhieu nguy hiem, giai quyet het moi co the thu thap co quan
Task.DoingTalk: Gap nguy hiem, tieu diet Soi xam
Task.CompleteTalk: Cac bang huu cung den vi vi bao vat nay, cung mot muc dich, hop tac cung thu thap la tot nhat.

Task.Title: Co Quan Bao Vat 9/11
Task.AcceptTalk: Day la phan cua bang huu, may co bang huu , ta moi pha giai de dang.
Task.DoingTalk: Thu thap co quan giup truong lao
Task.CompleteTalk: Da ta, co co quan nay Cai Bang se them mot phan suc manh, on cua thieu hiep ta nho ro.....!

Task.Title: Co Quan Bao Vat 10/11
Task.AcceptTalk: Bang chu chac dang cho tin, thieu hiep hay tro ve thong bao cho ngai....
Task.DoingTalk: Tro ve Cai Bang bao tin
Task.CompleteTalk: Hau sinh kha uy, tuong lai cua bang huu se rat xa, ta cho ngay do.

Task.Title: Co Quan Bao Vat 11/11
Task.AcceptTalk: Thay ta da ta Vo Lam Truyen Nhan, bang chung cai bang nhuo an tinh nay cua cac ha.
Task.DoingTalk: Ve thanh nghi ngoi
Task.CompleteTalk: Than phan cang cao thi trach nhiem cang cao, hi vong bang huu nho ki.

Task.Title: Kiep Nan Thieu Lam Tu 1/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Thieu Lam gan day co nan, bang huu den do ho tro di.
Task.DoingTalk: Bai kien Phuong Truong
Task.CompleteTalk: A di da phat, thi chu den tu Tuong Duong thanh?

Task.Title: Kiep Nan Thieu Lam Tu 2/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Thieu lam co nuoi mot bay Trau Rung de tro giup trong trot va van chuyen vat tu xuong nui. Nhung gan day dot nhien khong the kiem soat, mot chu toa chiu trach nhiem trong coi, thi chu hay den do hoi them tinh hinh.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Dat ma vien dau toa
Task.CompleteTalk: Dan trau dot nhien phat dien, ta cung khong ro nguyen nhan, thi chu hay den bai tha de dieu tra.

Task.Title: Kiep Nan Thieu Lam Tu 3/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Bai tha ben canh tu, thi chu can than vi chung rat nguy hiem....
Task.DoingTalk: Dieu tra dan trau trung doc, tieu diet Trau Rung
Task.CompleteTalk: Loai doc nay do mot loai con trung lay nhiem, ta co the chua dc.....

Task.Title: Kiep Nan Thieu Lam Tu 4/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Ben canh ho nuoc co 1 loai duoc lieu co the tri loai doc nay, thi chu hay di hai ve day
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Thieu Lam Phuong Truong
Task.CompleteTalk: Tot lam, hay doi ta dieu che thuoc giai......

Task.Title: Kiep Nan Thieu Lam Tu 5/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Thuoc da xong, thi chu hay giup ta giao cho Dat Ma
Task.DoingTalk: Giao thuoc cho Dat ma vien dau toa
Task.CompleteTalk: Khong ngo thi chu that ban linh, ta dung la duoc muo mang tam mat.

Task.Title: Kiep Nan Thieu Lam Tu 6/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Nho co thi chu, kho khan da duoc giai quyet, ta se truyen thu cam ta den dai nhan o Tuong Duong
Task.DoingTalk: Tro lai Tuong Duong gap vo lam truyen nhan
Task.CompleteTalk: Nguoi cua Thieu Lam het loi khen ngoi bang huu, tuoi tre da co long anh dung nhu vay, that la hiem co!

Task.Title: Thu Thach Mon Phai 1/9
Task.AcceptTalk: Den nga mi gap Dieu An, co ay co nhiem vu giao cho bang huu.
Task.DoingTalk: Thu thach nga my tieu diet Kim To Hau
Task.CompleteTalk: Hay giup ta tieu diet Kim To Hau

Task.Title: Thu Thach Mon Phai 2/9
Task.AcceptTalk: Den duong mon giup Tieu Nhiem Tau
Task.DoingTalk: Thu thach duong mon tieu diet Hac Diep Hau
Task.CompleteTalk: Hay giup ta tieu diet Khoi Diem Hau

Task.Title: Thu Thach Mon Phai 3/9
Task.AcceptTalk: Den thuy yen giup Le Hoa Su Gia
Task.DoingTalk: Thu thach thuy yen tieu diet Xa Li
Task.CompleteTalk: Hay giup ta tieu diet Xa Li

Task.Title: Thu Thach Mon Phai 4/9
Task.AcceptTalk: Den con lon giup Ngoc Hoanh Tu
Task.DoingTalk: Thu thach Con Lon tieu diet Thuong ung
Task.CompleteTalk: Hay giup ta tieu diet Thuong Ung

Task.Title: Thu Thach Mon Phai 5/9
Task.AcceptTalk: Den ngu doc giup Doc Nha
Task.DoingTalk: Thu thach Ngu Doc tieu diet Coc
Task.CompleteTalk: Hay giup ta tieu diet Coc

Task.Title: Thu Thach Mon Phai 6/9
Task.AcceptTalk: Den vo dang giup Tu Dai Nhac
Task.DoingTalk: Thu thach Vo Dang tieu diet Heo rung
Task.CompleteTalk: Hay giup ta tieu diet Heo Rung

Task.Title: Thu Thach Mon Phai 7/9
Task.AcceptTalk: Den hoa son giup Lan Hao Thien
Task.DoingTalk: Thu thach Hoa Son tieu diet Linh Mieu
Task.CompleteTalk: Hay giup ta tieu diet Linh Mieu

Task.Title: Thu Thach Mon Phai 8/9
Task.AcceptTalk: Den thien nhan giup Ngot Ngao
Task.DoingTalk: Thu thach Thien Nhan tieu diet Doi Xam
Task.CompleteTalk: Hay giup ta tieu diet Doi Xam

Task.Title: Thu Thach Mon Phai 9/9
Task.AcceptTalk: Moi chuyen da duoc giai quyet, bang huu hay ve bao tin mung cho dai nhan.
Task.DoingTalk: Tro ve bao tin cho Vo lam truyen nhan
Task.CompleteTalk: bang huu da giup ich rat nhieu cho cac mon phai, day la phan thuong cua bang huu.

Task.Title: Tam Dai Thanh Thi 1/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Gan day co mot so ke la mat lang vang o day, bang huu hay di dieu tra...
Task.DoingTalk: Hoi tham Chu tiem tra o tuong duong
Task.CompleteTalk: Day la mot trong tam dai thanh thi, nguoi la vao tiem ta con dong hon dan ban dia.......

Task.Title: Tam Dai Thanh Thi 2/7
Task.AcceptTalk: bang huu hay den thanh lau, cac co nuong o do biet nhieu hon ta
Task.DoingTalk: Hoi tham Nhu Ngoc o bien kinh
Task.CompleteTalk: Tieu thiep khong biet gi ca....... Hom qua Xuan Hoa co tiep khach lan dau den.

Task.Title: Tam Dai Thanh Thi 3/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Xuan Hoa la hoa khoi moi cua bon tiem, ngay can chut le vat moi co the hoi chuyen
Task.DoingTalk: Hoi Tham Xuan Hoa o bien kinh
Task.CompleteTalk: Chao dai quan nhan, ngay can hoi ta chuyen gi, nhung truoc tien ta can chut..........

Task.Title: Tam Dai Thanh Thi 4/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Ta co tiep 1 vi khach bang huu ngoai quoc, bon ho dang noi chuyen ve doanh trai nao do va noi ve Tuu Lau
Task.DoingTalk: Doi Thoai voi chu tuu lau o bien kinh
Task.CompleteTalk: Hom qua ho co an uong o day va hoi thue xe ngua di Phuong Tuong, ta chi biet vay thoi....

Task.Title: Tam Dai Thanh Thi 5/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Cho ta co cac loat xe ngua khac nhau, bang huu co the thue 1 chiec, duong di xa xoi ta khuyen bang huu nen thue xe di chuyen. O phuong tuong ta co mot nguoi ban, bang huu co the hoi tin tuc.
Task.DoingTalk: Di phuong tuong dieu tra
Task.CompleteTalk: bang huu la ban cua han sao, han co khoe khong? Ta van nho mui vi ruou cua tiem han, that la my vi nhan gian, lan sau gap han phai tra cong cho ta lan nay.

Task.Title: Tam Dai Thanh Thi 6/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Gan day co mot so nguoi ngoai quoc dang thu mua luong thuc, ngoai ra con thue tieu cuc de van chuyen.....
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi ong chu tieu cuc
Task.CompleteTalk: Thong tin khach hang khong the tiet lo, da nhan tien thi phai lam viec, mong thieu hiep khong nen lam kho ta. Nhung ta co the noi noi ta den..........Kiem Mon Quan

Task.Title: Tam Dai Thanh Thi 7/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Do la noi khong gianh cho mot nguoi tre tuoi nhu bang huu, nguy hiem den tinh mang luon rinh rap, ta khuyen bang huu nen quay ve.
Task.DoingTalk: Quay noi chuyen voi vo lam truyen nhan
Task.CompleteTalk: Ra la vay, bang huu quay lai la su lua chon sang suot, do la noi tap trung cac cao thu cua Kim quoc, voi vo cong hien tai neu bang huu den chi tim duong chet!

Task.Title: Bay Binh Bo Tran 1/6
Task.AcceptTalk: bang huu hay truyen loi ta den Tru Tri Phap Mon Tu , theo doi nguoi den tu vung ngoai o, de y hanh dong cua ho.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi tru tri o phuong tuong
Task.CompleteTalk: Ta hieu roi, nhung ta can thi chu lien lac voi cac de tu ngoai mon, thong bao cho ho y kien cua ta.

Task.Title: Bay Binh Bo Tran 2/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Noi ra ten huy cua ta, ho se hieu va nghe loi bang huu.
Task.DoingTalk: Truyen loi cua Tru Tri den Lu Lao Han
Task.CompleteTalk: De tu da ro, da ta thieu hiep, ta se chu y.

Task.Title: Bay Binh Bo Tran 3/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Thieu hiep nen di chuyen bi mat, tranh tai mat cua dich.
Task.DoingTalk: Truyen loi cua Tru Tri den Sam Hung
Task.CompleteTalk: De tu nghe lenh, da ta thieu hiep.

Task.Title: Bay Binh Bo Tran 4/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Gan day co nhieu nguoi la mua thong tin tu tuu diem, gan do co nguoi cua ta.
Task.DoingTalk: Truyen loi cua Tru Tri den Thai Dai Thuc
Task.CompleteTalk: De tu se chu y, da ta thieu hiep.

Task.Title: Bay Binh Bo Tran 5/6
Task.AcceptTalk: De tu buon ban tai day, moi chuyen se chu y, co dong tinh se bao tin cho Tru Tri
Task.DoingTalk: Bao tin cho Tru Tri
Task.CompleteTalk: Cac de tu ngoai mon cua bon tu, moi nguoi mot cong viec, moi thong tin co the nam bat nhanh nhat, thi chu yen tam.

Task.Title: Bay Binh Bo Tran 6/6
Task.AcceptTalk: bang huu hay chuyen loi dam bao cua ta cho dai nhan, co dong tinh se dua thu den de dai nhan chuan bi.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi vo lam truyen nhan
Task.CompleteTalk: Tru Tri that lam ta mo rong tam mat, co su dam bao cua ong ay ta cung yen tam.

Task.Title: Pho Thac Cua Dai Nhan 1/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Hien tai can bang huu giup ta chuan bi mot so quan phuc, lien he voi chu tiem tap hoa, ong ay co tay nghe rat tot.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen coi chu tiem tap hoa
Task.CompleteTalk: Quan phuc ky thuat che tao khong giong trang bi binh thuong, thieu hiep doi mot chut, ta se huong dan thieu hiep tim nguyen lieu.....

Task.Title: Pho Thac Cua Dai Nhan 2/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Thieu hiep hay den hoa son, noi do co nguyen lieu can thiet de che tao Quan Phuc.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet kim dieu
Task.CompleteTalk: Tot lam, ..

Task.Title: Pho Thac Cua Dai Nhan 3/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Tot lam, deu la nguyen lieu nguyen ven nhung van thieu them bang huu di lay cho ta.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet Gau Meo
Task.CompleteTalk: Tot lam, deu la nguyen lieu nguyen ven ma ta can.....

Task.Title: Pho Thac Cua Dai Nhan 4/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Tiep theo thieu hiep hay den Hoa Lang Dong, thu thap giup ta.........
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet Soi Do
Task.CompleteTalk: That nhanh nhen, ta co the hoan thanh som hon du kien....

Task.Title: Pho Thac Cua Dai Nhan 5/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Tay nghe cua tau tu Dang Gia rat tot, hay giup ta moi ba ay.
Task.DoingTalk: Nho nguoi may ao
Task.CompleteTalk: Duoc, cho ta voi chu tiem co giao tinh, bao voi ong ay ta se sang giup.

Task.Title: Pho Thac Cua Dai Nhan 6/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Trong viec may va, khong duoc bao nhieu nguoi co the gioi hon ta.
Task.DoingTalk: Nhan loi giup Chu tiem tap hoa
Task.CompleteTalk: Tot roi toi roi, tat ca nguyen lieu da du, can chut thoi gian la co the hoan thanh, cong lao thieu hiep rat lon, ta se giam gia cho dai nhan.

Task.Title: Pho Thac Cua Dai Nhan 7/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Thieu hiep hay tro ve bao voi dai nhan, khi hoan thanh Quan Phuc ta se mang sang tan noi.
Task.DoingTalk: Bao tin cho Vo lam truyen nhan
Task.CompleteTalk: bang huu lam viec rat hieu qua, ta khong nhin lam nguoi, con nhiem vu tiep theo , bang huu da chuan bi chua?

Task.Title: Chuan Bi Duoc Hoan 1/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Quan Phuc da xong, tiep theo nguoi giup ta chuan bi duoc lieu cho doanh trai, hay den gap chu hieu thuoc.
Task.DoingTalk: Gap chu hieu thuoc
Task.CompleteTalk: Dai nhan can 1 luong lon dan duoc? Thieu hiep hay giup ta thu thap duoc lieu nhe.

Task.Title: Chuan Bi Duoc Hoan 2/6
Task.AcceptTalk: O ngoai thanh Tuong Duong co moc Linh Chi, thieu hiep hay di thu thap ve cho ta.
Task.DoingTalk: Thu thap thao duoc Linh Chi
Task.CompleteTalk: Tot lam, con mot so nguyen lieu nua.

Task.Title: Chuan Bi Duoc Hoan 3/6
Task.AcceptTalk: O ngoai thanh Bien Kinh co moc Nhan Sam, thieu hiep hay di thu thap ve cho ta.
Task.DoingTalk: Thu thap thao duoc Nhan Sam
Task.CompleteTalk: Than thu thieu hiep that nhanh, tiep thep.....

Task.Title: Chuan Bi Duoc Hoan 4/6
Task.AcceptTalk: O ngoai thanh Phuong Tuong co moc Duong Quy, thieu hiep hay di thu thap ve cho ta.
Task.DoingTalk: Thu thap thao duoc Duong Quy
Task.CompleteTalk: Con vi thuoc cuoi cung, kha kho tim........

Task.Title: Chuan Bi Duoc Hoan 5/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Thien son tuyet lien, moc tren dinh hoa son, duong di kha nguy hiem, thieu hiep can than.
Task.DoingTalk: Thu thap thao duoc Tuyet Lien
Task.CompleteTalk: Duoc lieu da du, thieu hiep cho to dieu che.......

Task.Title: Chuan Bi Duoc Hoan 6/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Duoc Hoan da xong, thieu hiep hay dua ve cho dai nhan
Task.DoingTalk: Giao thuoc cho Vo lam truyen nhan
Task.CompleteTalk: Thuoc tot! tat ca da du, bang huu da giup ta rat nhieu, day la phan thuong se giup ich cho bang huu.

Task.Title: Hoang Kim Trang Bi
Task.AcceptTalk: Nguoi da du cung cap de nhan trong trach quan trong hon, hay quay lai Ba Lang Huyen noi chuyen voi long ngu.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Long Ngu o Ba Lang Huyen
Task.CompleteTalk: Phuong Trong Sinh la thanh quan hiem co, nhieu lan am tham giup do Nghia Quan ta. Han Thac Tru tung co giao hao voi ta, nen ta dinh nho nguoi den cau xin han, xin han khoan hong, dung lam kho Phuong Trong Sinh nua.

Task.Title: Vong Khai Nhat Dien 1/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Phuong Trong Sinh nhieu lan dac toi voi Kim Quoc Vo Su, ta lo so tren duong di day se bi am hai, nho bang huu den Bien Kinh xin Kim Quoc Vo Su khoan hong.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Kim Quoc Vo Su o bien kinh
Task.CompleteTalk: Phuong Trong Sinh? Ta von khong dinh tinh toan voi han, chi luu day den Tu Qua Doanh de han suy nghi, cac nguoi da den day xin cho han thi ta se tha han di.

Task.Title: Vong Khai Nhat Dien 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Tu Qua Doanh nam o Phuc Nguu Son ben ngoai Duong Chau Thanh, Dai tuong quan Tat Toan o do la cuu bo cua ta, nguoi chi can noi ten ta ra la dc.
Task.DoingTalk: Den Phuc Nguu Son noi chuyen voi Tat Toan
Task.CompleteTalk: Phuong Trong Sinh? Chi so han khong the roi khoi day, vai ngay truoc han bi doc trung can, vet thuong ngay cang nghiem trong.

Task.Title: Vong Khai Nhat Dien 3/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Quan y noi vung Dong Nam co mot loai Thanh Doc Thao co the tri cho han. Nhung o do co rat nhieu ran, khong ai dam di. Nguoi muon cuu han, truoc het phai tim thay Thanh Doc Thao.
Task.DoingTalk: Thu thap Thanh Doc Thao
Task.CompleteTalk: Duoc! Nguoi doi ta dieu che thuoc cho han uong!

Task.Title: Vong Khai Nhat Dien 4/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Han da khong sao roi. Han chuyen loi voi thu linh nguoi, Phuong Trong Sinh khong bao gio quen on cuu mang nay.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Long Ngu
Task.CompleteTalk: Oi... Trieu dinh luc nao moi co the yen on that su day...

Task.Title: Y Gia Tam 1/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Thoi gian nay mua lon lien mien, nuoc gieng bi mua lon van duc, sinh ra mot so tieu doc trung. Nguoi uong phai nuoc gieng nay se bi tieu chay, dau don vo cung.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Ngo Than Y
Task.CompleteTalk: Ta nho o Tien Cuc Dong co mot loai Han Diem hiem thay,co tac dung lam sach nuoc, con co the giet chet tieu doc trung trong nuoc.

Task.Title: Y Gia Tam 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Neu co the dem ve it Han Diem, nhung nguoi nay khong phai chiu kho nua.
Task.DoingTalk: Thu thap Han Diem
Task.CompleteTalk: Tot roi!

Task.Title: Y Gia Tam 3/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Hay di bao cho Long Ngu
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Long Ngu
Task.CompleteTalk: That sao? Ngo Than Y qua la tai gioi!

Task.Title: Y Gia Tam 4/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Lan nay may ma co nguoi tuong tro, ta thay mat moi nguoi o day da ta nguoi. Den Phuong Tuong Phu tim Ngao Van Tong nhan nhiem vu.
Task.DoingTalk: Den phuong tuong gap Ngao Van Tong
Task.CompleteTalk: Nghe ong chu Tieu Cuc dot ngot quay ve, ai cung tranh nhau tang le vat de gianh duoc thien cam cua ong ta.

Task.Title: Khoi Thong 1/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Nghe noi ong chu Tieu Cuc bi nhiem han doc. Ta nghe su phu noi co loai Hoa Thi Vu ky sinh tren co the nguoi chet, giai han doc cuc tot, chung chi moc o bai tha ma Me Cung Sa Mac. Hay giup ta di lay no.
Task.DoingTalk: Dua thuoc cho ong chu tieu cuc o phuong tuong
Task.CompleteTalk: Ngao Van Tong dung la co long, rat nhieu le vat duoc dua den nhung duy chi co mon nay la hop y ta

Task.Title: Khoi Thong 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Phien chuyen loi voi Ngao Van Tong, sau nay co viec gi thi cu tim ta.
Task.DoingTalk: Bao tin cho Ngao Van Tong
Task.CompleteTalk: Sau nay ta khong con phai lo gi nua roi.

Task.Title: Khoi Thong 3/3
Task.AcceptTalk: An tinh cua bang huu ta xin ghi long tac da, bang huu hay tim Tru Tri Phap Mon Tu nhan nhiem vu.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi tru tri phap mon tu
Task.CompleteTalk: Ta muon nho nguoi dem mon an nay cho Banh Tieu De bi nhot trong nha kho , sau khi hoan thanh se hau ta. Nhung viec nay phai giu bi mat. Neu nguoi lam duoc thi den tim ta lay mon an dem cho han!

Task.Title: Banh Tieu De 1/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Duoc, nguoi hay dem thuc an nay cho Banh Tieu Do bi nhot tai nha kho, la mon an han thich. Sau khi han an xong, nguoi ve tim ta.
Task.DoingTalk: Dua mon an cho banh tieu de o phuong tuong
Task.CompleteTalk: O! Day la banh to ta thich nhat, da ta nguoi, nguoi tot qua!

Task.Title: Banh Tieu De 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Thay ta da ta Tru Tri, du ta pham loi lon, nhung ong ay rat quan tam den ta.
Task.DoingTalk: Tro ve bao tin cho tru tri phap mon tu
Task.CompleteTalk: Cam tien thuong di mau, dung o day, coi chung bi nguoi ta phat hien.

Task.Title: Te Song 1/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Den cua tu tim nguoi ban hang rong, nhan nhiem vu.
Task.DoingTalk: Tro chuyen voi Hang Rong
Task.CompleteTalk: Bon nguoi Dao Nhat Thien Giao nay gat lao tu den noi day, khong ngo mang ta lam vat te than. Cung may ta bi xep cuoi cung, nhan co hoi nay dao thong dao chon di.

Task.Title: Te Song 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Moi han nay nuot khong troi, neu co nguoi thay ta xoa so dam ta giao nay, lao tu se dang tang tat ca bao boi cua nhung nguoi da chet.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet Bon Loi o lam du quan
Task.CompleteTalk: Rat tot, tang nguoi mon qua nay.

Task.Title: Te Song 3/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Tang Van Anh co nuong dang gap chut van de, nguoi hay den hoi tham.
Task.DoingTalk: Tham hoi Tang Van Anh co nuong
Task.CompleteTalk: Di di! Ta han tan xuong tuy dam giang ho cac nguoi, dung den gan ta, neu khong ta se lieu mang voi nguoi.

Task.Title: Diet Sach Bao Thu 1/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Nguoi noi khong phai cung mot phe, vay duoi het bon Ngan Nha vo danh kia di, giet chet bon chung bao thu cho dan thon ta.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu Diet ngan nha o lam du quan
Task.CompleteTalk: Ta da trach sai nguoi.................

Task.Title: Diet Sach Bao Thu 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Moi chuyen bat dau o kien kinh, nguoi hay den gap Bac Cong Tu.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Bach Cong Tu o bien kinh
Task.CompleteTalk: Nguoi la......! Van Anh co nuong van on chu?

Task.Title: Dai An Tu Mau Hoan 1/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Neu ngay mai van khong tim thay Tu Mau Hoan, cac huynh de phai uong mang roi.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi tien trang
Task.CompleteTalk: Gan day trong nuoc noi len mot to chuc goi la Anh Tu Hoi, nghe noi trong do co doi Bon Loi chuyen cuop ky bao roi lai ban di.

Task.Title: Dai An Tu Mau Hoan 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Ta nghi Tu Mau Hoan chac chan bi chung cuop di roi.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet Bon Loi o lam du quan
Task.CompleteTalk: Dung la Tu Mau Hoan! Lan nay huynh de cua ta duoc cuu roi.

Task.Title: Lam Du quan 1/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Luu Vien ngoai co nhiem vu cho nguoi, hay den noi chuyen voi ong ay
Task.DoingTalk: Doi Thoai voi luu vien ngoai
Task.CompleteTalk: Tu khi Hoang Thuong dua my nhan ve thi suot ngay chi o hau cung, buong long viec trieu chinh, dan den su bat man cua dai than va quy toc trong nuoc.

Task.Title: Lam Du quan 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Co mot so nguoi bat man voi Hoang thuong se nhan co hoi nay lat do, tuy cach nay nghi that tuc cuoi, nhung than tu chung ta cung phai de cao canh giac. Nguoi co the den Tong Hieu Uy tham thinh chung da bat dau hanh dong hay chua.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Tong Hieu Uy
Task.CompleteTalk: Dam nguoi nay that khong biet dang muon gi. Chung mua chuoc Ngan Nha phu trach sua chua, muon pha hoai phong thuy va co quan noi day, that la lieu linh.

Task.Title: Lam Du quan 3/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Nguoi da den day, thi hay cho chung biet tay
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet ngan nha o lam du quan
Task.CompleteTalk: Bon ac tac nay, uong cong ta ne tinh voi chung, lai lam ra chuyen ton hai am duc nay. Lan nay nhat dinh khong the tha cho chung!

Task.Title: Nghia Chi So Tai 1/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Tan Lang nam o bien gioi Dai Tong va Tay Ha, la noi cac binh gia tranh gianh nhau. Do hai phia deu khong chiu nhuong nhin dan den chien tranh lien mien, nguoi chiu kho chinh la dan chung.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi luu vien ngoai
Task.CompleteTalk: Ta muon nho nguoi hay day cho bon Tau Thach dam dot nhap lanh tho Dai Tong mot tran, nguoi thay the nao?

Task.Title: Nghia Chi So Tai 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Nguoi hay len duong cang nhanh cang tot....!
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet tau thach o mac cao quat
Task.CompleteTalk: Tu khi den day chung ta moi phat hien noi nay khong yen on, Linh dao ngu cua mot doi quan tro thanh luu khau, tren duong chung con thu nhan them dan ngheo va tho phi, the luc cang lon.

Task.Title: Dai Vi Khu Truc 1/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Khong nhung tap ket o day cuop boc ba tanh ma con danh du kich chien voi quan binh. Nho co nguoi giup ba tanh diet tru chung.
Task.DoingTalk: Tro chuyen voi Phuong Lao Thai
Task.CompleteTalk: Nguoi hanh tau giang ho da lau, chac da tung nghe den Anh Tu Hoi, nhung nguoi nay gan day da chiem cu phia nam cua Chan Ngon Tu, khong biet la co muu do gi.

Task.Title: Dai Vi Khu Truc 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Nguoi hay den do tim hieu, cho du y do cua chung la gi thi cung phai doc het suc duoi chung ra khoi do. Ta an cu o day khong muon viec tu hanh bi chung quay nhieu.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu Diet khi ngua
Task.CompleteTalk: Nguoi lam tot lam.

Task.Title: Dai Vi Khu Truc 3/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Hay dem tin nay bao cho Thu Lam, nho y cho nguoi den tim, neu tim duoc cung la mot viec tot.
Task.DoingTalk: Tro chuyen voi Long Ngu o Ba Lang Huyen
Task.CompleteTalk: Gan day nghe noi Tu Ban Kiem cau ket voi mot bon nhieu su tu tap o ben ngoai Giang Tan Thon dinh chong doi chung ta, noi do rat gan nghia quan, ta khong the khong de phong.

Task.Title: Dan Buoc Giang Ho 1/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Ta da phai den do do tham, nguoi hay cho chung nem mui de chung tu rut lui.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi le quan
Task.CompleteTalk: Lu cuong do nay dam chong doi nghia quan ta, tu xung nghia si ma khong biet chung chi bi nguoi khac loi dung. Nguoi phai cho chung nem mui de chung tu bo y dinh.

Task.Title: Dan Buoc Giang Ho 2/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Trong giang ho mang duoc yeu thua, de chung kieng de nghia quan ta la tot. Nhung lam nguoi khong nen qua ngang nguoc, neu khong se co nhieu ke thu!
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi tham cuu
Task.CompleteTalk: Ta thay nguoi giong con nha vo, co mot viec bi mat muon nguoi lam, xong viec se co thuong.

Task.Title: Dan Buoc Giang Ho 3/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Gan day co mot vat tuyet mat xuat phat tu Tan Lang, vat nay co quan he nhieu voi ta, ta nhat dinh phai co duoc. Neu nguoi lay duoc vat nay ta se trong thuong.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu Diet Doi Quy o tan lang
Task.CompleteTalk: Khong sai, chinh la no! Dam ngu ngoc truoc day deu khong tim duoc no, xem ra nguoi la ke gioi nhat, sau nay co viec can phai nho den nguoi!

Task.Title: Dan Buoc Giang Ho 4/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Da ta, hien tai long ngu dang co nhiem vu quan trong cho nguoi, hay den tiep nhan dung de ong ta cho lau.
Task.DoingTalk: Tro ve Gap Long Ngu
Task.CompleteTalk: Thuc luc hien tai cua bang huu van chua du de dam nhan nhiem vu tiep theo. Hay ren luyen them roi hang quay lai gap ta.

Task.Title: Dan Buoc Giang Ho 5/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Da tau la nguoi lu hanh noi tieng thien ha, hay den gap ong ay de nhan mot so nhiem vu hang ngay, se giup ich cho bang huu rat nhieu.
Task.DoingTalk: Den tro chuyen voi Da Tau
Task.CompleteTalk: Thieu hiep than thu rat tot! Co muon ho tro ta mot so nhiem vu khong?

Task.Title: Dan Buoc Giang Ho 6/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Ta se co nhuung phan thuong xung dang, se khong khien nguoi that vong.
Task.DoingTalk: Tro chuyen voi da tau
Task.CompleteTalk: Gio nguoi hay suy nghi roi quay lai gap ta!
